summary: The diff implements most of the requested advertisement management system. REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4, and REQ-5 appear substantially implemented. REQ-1 (backend) is partially visible but the Advertisement type uses 'image: Storage.ExternalBlob' instead of the specified 'imageUrl: Text' field, and the backend CRUD functions are truncated. AdBanner.tsx calls 'ad.image.getDirectURL()' instead of using 'ad.imageUrl' as specified. AdminDashboard does not import or use useUpdateAd, so the update action is missing from the admin UI.

missing_requirements.requirement: Advertisement data type must have field 'imageUrl: Text'. The backend CRUD implementations (createAd, updateAd, deleteAd, toggleAdActive, getAdsByPlacement) are not confirmed visible in the truncated diff.
missing_requirements.reason: The visible backend diff shows 'image: Storage.ExternalBlob' instead of 'imageUrl: Text'. The function bodies are truncated and cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin table should support editing/updating ad fields via useUpdateAd.
missing_requirements.reason: AdminDashboard.tsx imports only useCreateAd, useDeleteAd, and useToggleAdActive. useUpdateAd is not imported or used, so no update/edit action exists in the admin UI.

hallucinated_features.description: AdBanner renders the ad image using 'ad.image.getDirectURL()', treating the image as a blob object with a method call rather than a plain imageUrl string.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec defines the Advertisement type with 'imageUrl: Text', a plain URL string. The ExternalBlob pattern with getDirectURL() was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: The Advertisement backend type uses 'image: Storage.ExternalBlob' via a blob-storage mixin instead of the specified 'imageUrl: Text' field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly specifies 'imageUrl' as a Text field. Using ExternalBlob is an unrequested architectural deviation.
